implementation_files_allowed_for_p3_buil.creation_pattern: P3 BUILD may be split into 3 sub-phases (P3-RUNNER + P3-IS-DRIVER + P3-OOS-DRIVER) each separately authorized; OR combined under a single authorization. P1 plan-lock recommends including test scaffold in original P3 BUILD to avoid the S10-D2-style P3.5 retrofit pattern.
implementation_files_allowed_for_p3_buil.test_scaffold_inclusion_recommendation: include in P3 BUILD directly to avoid S10-D2 P3.5 retrofit pattern

input_data_path_and_sha_requirement.primary_access: READ-ONLY; byte-equivalent reuse from s10-D1 sealed fetch
input_data_path_and_sha_requirement.primary_format: CSV (per s10-D1 fetch tool output schema; daily bars with ts_event index)

k9_and_sample_size_rules.expected_is_trade_count_estimate: Donchian-15/8 bi-directional on MNQ.c.0 over 4.6y IS expected ~80 (low) / 140 (central) / 200 (high) portfolio trades; ~3-4x s11-d1 v1's Donchian-55/20 expectation of 25-50 trades
k9_and_sample_size_rules.expected_oos_trade_count_estimate_REC1_c: Implied OOS over 2.0y at IS rate: ~35 (low) / 61 (central) / 87 (high) trades, all below K9=100; OOS K9 STRUCTURALLY UNREACHABLE
k9_and_sample_size_rules.if_k9_fires_at_is: Verdict at IS shall be INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE (NOT FAIL_SAFETY). Chain shall NOT relax K9. Operator decides between (a) continuing to P10 OOS despite IS being undersampled, (b) parking S12-D1 with PARK memo at IS stage, or (c) selecting a different mechanic family in a fresh candidate.
k9_and_sample_size_rules.if_k9_fires_at_oos: Verdict at OOS shall be INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE / OOS_INDETERMINATE. Chain shall NOT relax K9. Appropriate response is to park S12-D1 with PARK memo analogous to S10-D2 P11 PARK at PARKED_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE_K9_FIRED. This is the EXPECTED terminal verdict per REC1 disclosure carried byte-equivalent from SEAL.

dr_rules_p6_5_cost_stress_sweep.DR10_turnover_cost_explosion: fires if annual_turnover > 0.50 OR S2 cost drag > 0.05; ELEVATED prior probability vs s11-d1 v1; mitigated via DA4=B START_CASH=$100k
dr_rules_p6_5_cost_stress_sweep.DR2_tier_net_pnl_le_0: fires if any non-baseline tier net_pnl <= 0
dr_rules_p6_5_cost_stress_sweep.DR3_tier_sharpe_proxy_le_0: fires if any non-baseline tier sharpe <= 0
dr_rules_p6_5_cost_stress_sweep.DR4_tier_expectancy_le_0: fires if any non-baseline tier expectancy <= 0
dr_rules_p6_5_cost_stress_sweep.DR5_tier_closed_trades_lt_100: fires if any non-baseline tier closed_trades < 100
